servinfo.title: Steering Column Inspection

attention3.ptxt: Steering column assembly should be inspected if vehicle was involved in accident and steering column assembly was exposed to impact or air bag deployed.

servinfo.ptxt: Perform the following checks if damage to steering column assembly is suspected. If check result is not OK, replace steering column assembly with new one.

item.ptxt: Check that two capsules (1) are attached to steering column bracket securely.
Check steering column assembly for looseness in direction of arrows [a] and [b] in figure with telescopic and tilt lever locked.
Check that distances “a” and “b” shown in figure are as specified.

spec.title: Power steering column length
spec.ptxt: “a”: 483 mm (19.02 in.) (fully extended) / 447 mm (17.60 in.) (fully retracted)
